This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] [required] quantizeLinear float32 3D input with implicit block_size = [1, 2, 1].
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'build' on 'MLGraphBuilder': QuantizeLinear can't support block-wise."
[FAIL] [optional] quantizeLinear float16 3D input with implicit block_size = [1, 2, 1].
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'build' on 'MLGraphBuilder': QuantizeLinear can't support block-wise."
Harness: the test ran to completion.
